1: With my voice unto the LORD LORD did I make my supplication.
2: I shewed before him my trouble.
3: In the way wherein I walked have they privily laid a snare for me.
4: No man cared for my soul.
5: I said, Thou art art my refuge and and my portion in the land of the living.
6: For they are stronger than I.
7: For thou shalt deal bountifully with me.
